category_sources: source_facts.description says Cahute is a library and utilities for interacting with Casio calculators; official documentation includes command-line and header references.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cahute; official cahuteproject.org documentation uses the Cahute name.
docs_sources: Official cahuteproject.org site is the built documentation for the latest release and documents project versioning, repository structure, and references.
repo_sources: Official Cahute versioning documentation states the main repository is gitlab.com/cahuteproject/cahute.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official Cahute documentation lists command-line utilities and library header references for calculator interaction.
